decks.notes: This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly amassing a board presence with efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Boomerang Basics and Into the Flood Maw. The deck aims to maintain a high level of card selection and advantage through cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt, while also pushing damage through with burst spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent. The deck seeks to close out games quickly before the opponent can establish a strong defense.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on maintaining board control through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy by countering key spells and removing threats with cards like Burst Lightning and Sear. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide additional defense while Winternight Stories and Sleight of Hand help dig for key cards. The deck's mana base includes a mix of Islands and dual lands to ensure consistent access to both blue and red mana.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure on the opponent through a combination of evasive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier, the deck aims to deal damage efficiently while controlling the opponent's board with cards like Get Lost and Seam Rip. The inclusion of cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd provides additional support and protection for the deck's key creatures, allowing for a strong, aggressive gameplay style.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast and efficient creatures along with powerful spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It aims to establish board presence early with cards like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, generating value with Gene Pollinator and Mockingbird, and finishing off the game with massive threats like Craterhoof Behemoth. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Archdruid's Charm and Seam Rip to control the opponent's board and tempo. The mana base is carefully designed to ensure smooth and consistent mana production for the aggressive game plan.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to establish an early board presence with efficient creatures like Fanatical Firebrand and Stadium Headliner, supported by burn spells like Torch the Tower and Burst Lightning to clear the way and finish off the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Inspiring Vantage and Sacred Foundry ensures consistent mana sources to keep the pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on utilizing fast and efficient creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, you can get your bigger threats out early, such as Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Mightform Harmonizer. Earthbender Ascension and Esper Origins provide additional buffs to your creatures, allowing them to deal even more damage. The versatile spells like Meltstrider's Resolve and Archdruid's Charm can help you maintain board control and push for lethal damage. Overall, this deck aims to be aggressive and put pressure on your opponent from the start.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence and apply pressure on the opponent through aggressive creature attacks. With a mix of ramp, creatures with powerful abilities, and ways to protect and enhance them, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can set up their own game plan. By utilizing cards that can generate extra mana and provide additional creature options, this deck aims to consistently put pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly.

This red aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with efficient low-cost creatures and burn spells. The strategy is to maintain early pressure with cards like Fanatical Firebrand and Hired Claw, while finishing off opponents with powerful flyers like Nova Hellkite and Razorkin Needlehead. The deck also includes a mix of burn spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike to both control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. With a streamlined mana base and a focus on aggression, this deck aims to win games quickly and decisively.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and out-tempo the opponent by playing aggressive creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off while disrupting their game plan with bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Burst Lightning. The deck also focuses on card advantage with spells like Stock Up and Sleight of Hand to maintain pressure and close out the game efficiently. The combination of aggressive creatures, disruptive spells, and card advantage allows the deck to control the pace of the game and overwhelm the opponent quickly.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with low cost creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while utilizing spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to control the board and deal damage. The deck also includes card draw options like Opt and Sleight of Hand to maintain hand advantage. Multiversal Passage and Secret Identity provide versatility and protection for key creatures. The mana base is designed for consistency and speed, with a mix of lands to ensure smooth casting of spells and creatures.

The core concept of this deck is to efficiently use powerful reanimation spells to bring back high-impact creatures from the graveyard, allowing for explosive plays and overwhelming the opponent. By utilizing cards like Deceit, Restless Reef, and Requiting Hex to manipulate the graveyard, along with key combo pieces like Superior Spider-Man and Winternight Stories, the deck aims to quickly assemble a powerful board presence and close out the game in a few crucial turns. The inclusion of additional control elements like Quantum Riddler and Doomsday Excruciator helps support the combo strategy and protect the key pieces.

The deck focuses on using reanimation spells and combo pieces to bring back powerful creatures from the graveyard. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's hand with cards like Duress, while setting up the graveyard with spells like Bitter Triumph. Once the combo pieces are in place, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with huge creatures like Harvester of Misery and Superior Spider-Man. Cards like Restless Reef and Watery Grave help fix the mana base, while powerful spells like Stock Up and Doomsday Excruciator serve as finishers.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures along with burn spells to deal damage quickly and efficiently to the opponent. The deck focuses on using cheap spells and creatures to pressure the opponent and control the board. By sequencing spells and creatures effectively, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent, while also having the ability to control the board when necessary. Overall, the deck's goal is to win the game as quickly as possible through efficient use of resources and aggressive plays.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the board through a combination of removal spells, counter spells, and bounce effects. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy by countering key spells, bouncing problematic creatures, and removing threats with damage-based spells. The inclusion of card draw and filtering spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand helps to ensure that the player can find the necessary answers to maintain control of the game. Additionally, the deck features a mix of creatures to provide additional threats and win conditions.

The deck focuses on quickly playing creatures and using cheap spells to deal damage to the opponent's life total as fast as possible. The key strategy is to control the board with spells like Burst Lightning and Torch the Tower, while also utilizing the abilities of Quantum Riddler and Thundertrap Trainer to deal extra damage. The inclusion of cards like Get Out and Ill-Timed Explosion provide additional ways to disrupt the opponent's game plan and secure a swift victory through aggressive plays and clever use of resources.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures and cheap spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. Utilizing a combination of instants, sorceries, and creatures with evasion abilities, it aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes cards that can provide card advantage and enable tempo plays to maintain pressure on the opponent. With a mix of aggression and card advantage, this deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively.
